description:
Legal record (#62) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f. 16r-v of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated 2 Av Tammuz 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE. 

(Document #62) Business release agreement involving: Moshe b. Yaʿaqov Gomeṣ, Benyamin Lopes Blandón (a resident of Livorno), Yaʿaqov Gomeṣ, and Benyamin Lopes (a resident of Alexandria). The father and son Moshe and Yaʿaqov Gomeṣ are listed as residents of Cairo. Benyamin Lopes (of Alexandria) is listed as the son-in-law of Yaʿaqov Gomeṣ. Moshe b. Yaʿaqov Gomeṣ commits not to sue or to seek any further benefit from past business relations and debts with Benyamin Lopes Blandón (of Livorno). The entry notes that Moshe's father and Benyamin Lopes (of Alexandria) had already carried out the same legal procedures in issuing Benyamin Lopes Blandón (of Livorno) a deed of release. MCD.
description_he: רשומה משפטית (#62) בפנקס בית דין רבני בקהיר (BL OR 6356, דפים 16r-v); בעברית; ב' אב ה'תמ"ג (1683 לספירה); שחרור עסקי הכולל: משה בן יעקב גוֹמֶץ, בנימין לוֹפֶּס בְּלָאנְדוֹן (תושב ליוורנו), יעקב גומץ ובנימין לופס (תושב אלכסנדריה); משה מתחייב שלא לתבוע עוד את בנימין לופס בלאנדון
